# meok-haulage-governance-bridge-mcp

> The MEOK Compliance-to-Governance Bridge. Crosswalk any haulage compliance attestation (DVSA, FMCSA, EU 561, BS 7121, NHVR, IATA DGR, IMO MARPOL, etc.) into the matching EU AI Act + AI governance obligations. Single integration MCP. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- crosswalk_to_ai_act
- classify_ai_risk_tier
- list_provider_obligations
- list_deployer_obligations
- generate_fria_inputs
- generate_ifu_skeleton
- crosswalk_to_nist_rmf
- crosswalk_to_iso_42001
- chain_attestations
- check_uk_ai_bill_art_22c

## Install
```
pip install meok-haulage-governance-bridge-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-haulage-governance-bridge-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
